markdown:
#  Delete a Drawing Set 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Admin' permissions on the Drawings tool.
  * **Additional Information:**
    * If you want to delete a drawing set that has drawings in it, you will need to first [delete drawings](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/delete-drawings) in that set.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to your project's **Drawings** tool.
  2. Click the **Configure Settings** ![Icons Settings Gear](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/8d4e4403c0eed73423d93c414c08e3a6/35b17d2e5497c876221891c1d9e5a114/icons-settings-gear.png?fm=webp&h=15) icon.
  3. Under 'Drawing Log Settings,' scroll to the 'Edit Drawing Sets' section.
  4. Click the **delete** ![Icon Delete X](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/1c18d7f16e57f4e8e0e6c7ce765a2275/b035fb0139aa509801e58a49859ac2fa/icon-delete-x.png?fm=webp&h=15) icon next to the empty drawing set you want to delete.  
_Note_ : You can only delete empty drawing sets. If a set has at least one drawing, the **delete** ![Icon Delete X2](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/1908d094eaf465647bc516375968d9f0/cc2bd0020879ebdf73de3eb25264dfe9/icon-delete-x2.png?fm=webp&h=15) icon will be grayed out and inactive.
  5. Verify that you want to delete the drawing set.


## See Also
  * [Edit a Drawing Set's Name or Date](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/edit-a-drawing-set-name-or-date)
  * [Drawings - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/permissions)
  * [Configure Advanced Settings: Drawings](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/configure-advanced-settings-drawings)
title: Delete a Drawing Set
description: How to delete a drawing set in the Drawings tool.
